forgotPassword.heading: Reset password
forgotPassword.subheading: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists for that email, you'll receive a reset link shortly.

verifyEmail.heading: Check your inbox
verifyEmail.body: We sent a verification link{emailSuffix}. Click it to activate your account.
verifyEmail.notReceived: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder. The link expires after 24 hours.
